title: Tutor Request
description: Phase G contract: what the pedagogy engine hands the NVIDIA-Council-backed tutor for a single turn. The tutor's final answer must still pass Council support/citation gates before reaching the learner.

masteryState.description: conceptId -> mastery level (new | learning | proficient | mastered).

retrievedWikiPages.description: conceptIds of wiki pages retrieved for this turn, scoped to activeConcept's graph neighborhood — must not include stale context from another chapter.

openNotebookPassages.description: Open Notebook citation-candidate passage ids, subject to the same Council support gate as wiki claims.
